summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of new dashboard home features (AI Content Generator, Viral Carousel Ideas, Setup Modal, UserPreferences). 8/8 backend pytest cases pass. 26/26 frontend Playwright assertions pass end-to-end. All 4 new features work correctly with real OpenAI GPT-4o calls. No regressions to existing widgets.
passed_tests: GET /api/health -> 200 status:ok
POST /api/ai-content/generate (topic only, multipart) -> 200 with 15 hashtags (no #-prefix), 10 keywords, contentType, estimatedReach in {High,Medium,Low}
POST /api/ai-content/generate (topic + 64x64 PNG image multipart) -> 200, vision pipeline accepted image
POST /api/ai-content/generate (empty body) -> 400 'Provide a topic or upload media'
GET /api/carousel-ideas?platform=Instagram&niche=Finance -> 200 with 7 ideas, each idea has id/title/hook/slides(5-10)/engagementScore(1-10)/trendingTag/format(in 5 allowed)
GET /api/carousel-ideas caching: same platform+niche second call returns identical ideas in <5s (cache hit)
GET /api/carousel-ideas with different combos (TikTok/Fitness vs Twitter/Tech) returns different IDs (cache busted properly)
GET /api/user-preferences?userId=TEST_xxx -> 200 with {data: null} when no row exists (no 500 even when supabase table missing)
Frontend dashboard loads with demo user seeded in localStorage
SetupModal auto-opens within 5s on first visit (no prefs set)
SetupModal Step 1 platform grid shows exactly 6 platforms
Continue button disabled before selection, enabled after Instagram selected
SetupModal Step 2 niche grid shows exactly 13 niches
Selecting Finance + Save closes modal AND persists to localStorage key cx_user_prefs_v1:demo-user-001 with {platform:Instagram,niche:Finance,isSetupComplete:true}
AIContentGenerator section renders with topic input, image/video upload, Generate button
Generate triggers skeleton state then renders output cards (title, description, 15 hashtag pills, 10 keyword pills, contentType, reach badge)
ViralCarouselIdeas renders 7 cards once prefs are set
Niche badge shows 'Niche: Finance'
Each card has format badge, score, title, hook, slides count, Generate Carousel button
Clicking LinkedIn platform pill re-fetches and shows fresh 7 cards (cache busted by platform change)
Empty state shows when prefs cleared: carousel-ideas-empty + Set Up Now button visible
Regression: Trend Radar, Performance, AI Intelligence widgets still rendered on dashboard
Existing top input + Carousel/Poll/Viral/Repurpose chips + Start Creating button intact
action_items: Browser console shows several 'Failed to load resource: 500' errors during dashboard load — appears to be from existing widgets (Trend Radar/Performance) calling other backend endpoints that may not have full data. Does NOT affect new feature functionality, but main agent may want to investigate which existing endpoint(s) return 500 on a fresh demo user.

Login form via UI (POST credentials at /login) didn't redirect within 20s timeout in initial attempt — main agent may want to verify the demo signIn() function correctly seeds carouselex_demo_user and triggers router.push('/dashboard'). Workaround used: pre-seed localStorage. Likely a slow client-side hydration issue not a real bug.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1763 lines — >700 line threshold; should be modularized into routers (e.g., /routers/ai_content.py, /routers/carousel.py, /routers/preferences.py)
Carousel ideas cache (_carousel_cache dict) is in-memory and not bounded — could grow unbounded with many platform/niche combinations. Add LRU or max size
AI Content Generator uses gpt-4o for every request including topic-only; consider gpt-4o-mini for topic-only requests to reduce cost and latency
/api/carousel-ideas error path returns 500 with {'detail': {'error':...,'detail':...}} — frontend error parsing relies on response.detail being a string elsewhere. Standardize error response shape
Image MIME-type validation is good (_ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES) — small images (<32x32) are rejected by OpenAI but no client-side validation; consider adding minimum dimension check
seed_data_creation: None required — uses localStorage demo auth + best-effort Supabase prefs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new dashboard features fully working: (1) AI Content Generator hits real GPT-4o vision API (~15-25s per call), accepts topic + optional image/video upload; (2) Viral Carousel Ideas hits GPT-4o text API and returns exactly 7 ideas, has 30-min TTL cache keyed by platform.lower()+niche.lower(); DataForSEO not configured -> falls back gracefully; (3) Setup Modal auto-opens 500ms after dashboard load via sessionStorage 'cx_setup_modal_shown' guard; (4) UserPreferences uses localStorage key 'cx_user_prefs_v1:{userId}' as primary persistence + best-effort Supabase upsert. Console shows non-blocking 500 errors during dashboard load — appears to be from PRE-EXISTING widgets (Trend Radar/Performance/AI Intelligence) calling other backend endpoints, not from the new features.
rca of the issue: N/A — all features verified working. Only minor observation: original /login -> /dashboard navigation via filling form fields didn't complete in 20s; likely demo signIn auth-context delay. Workaround (pre-seed localStorage) confirmed dashboard renders correctly.
